examples: A subindex measuring input prices fell to 66.2 in April, a seven-month low, from 68.3 in March.
The subindex of owners reporting hard-to-fill job openings held steady at 15% after falling 5 points in June.
The Straits Times Index's real-estate subindex slipped 1.6% to 796.45 points on Monday, compared with the overall STI's 0.3% decline.
The net earnings trend subindex fell another 5 percentage points to -27% after it had declined 7 points to -22% in June.
